transcript.text: Hello Bhavesh , I am Priya from Kaya Clinic. Is this right time to talk to you?
Yes.
[Warmly] Great! Could you please tell me what concern you'd like to address – is it related to skin, hair, or something else?
Haan, mujhe face pe thode pimpleshain.

[Empathetically] theek hai, pimples ke liye hamare paas chemical peels aur facials jaise treatments hain. Hamare dermatologist aapke concern ko evaluate karke ek [confident] personalised plan banayenge.
अच्छा?
Haan bilkul. Aapka first name Bhavesh hai, [Patiently] could I please get your last name?
मेरा last name टांक है।
[Warmly] Theek hai, Bhavesh Tank. Aap kaun se city mein rehte hain?
Surat mein rehta hoon.
[Warmly] theek hai, aap Surat mein rehte hain. Surat mein hamare do branches hain: Vesu aur Ghod Dod Road. Aapke liye kaun sa convenient rahega?
Ghod Dod Road.
[Warmly] Theek hai, main aapka appointment Ghod Dod Road, Surat branch mein note kar leti hoon. Ab aap apni preferred appointment date batayein?
Aa, iss Shaniwar ko.6 June.
[Warmly] theek hai, 6 June ko. Aur time kya prefer karenge aap? Hamare clinic hours subah 10 baje se raat 8 baje tak hain, aur hum 30-minute slots mein book karte hain.
Raam ko 7 baje।
[Warmly] Theek hai, shaam ko 7 baje ka slot available hai. Main aapka appointment 6 June ko shaam 7:00 baje Ghod Dod Road branch, Surat mein book kar rahi hoon.
Okay, ठीक है।
[Warmly] theek hai. Ek basic consultation bilkul free hai. Agar detailed medical evaluation ki zaroorat padti hai, toh uski fees Rs. 750 hogi.
Okay, no problem.
[Warmly] theek hai. Ab aap apni email address bata sakte hain?
bhavesh369rta@gmail.com
[Warmly] theek hai. Aapki email address hai B-H-A-V-E-S-H-3-6-9-R-T-A at gmail dot com. Sahi hai?
[Warmly] Okay, my apologies. Toh correct email address hai B-H-A-V-E-S-H-3-6-9-T-A-N-K at gmail dot com. Sahi hai?
हाँ, सही है।
[Warmly] theek hai. Aur aapki date of birth kya hai?
[Warmly] theek hai. Aapka date of birth 16 February 2004 hai. Aur aapka 6-digit pin code kya hai?
[Warmly] theek hai, aapka pin code 394107 hai.
[Warmly] theek hai. Aapka naam Bhavesh Tank, appointment Ghod Dod Road, Surat mein 6 June ko shaam 7 baje, aur aapko pimples ka concern hai. Sab details sahi hain?
[Patiently] Can you hear me?
Hello?हाँ, totally correct.
[Warmly] Aapka appointment book ho gaya hai aur aapko jald hi confirmation mil jayegi. Have a wonderful day, bye!
